name: HentaiCity
author: Community
payload: class Provider { getSettings() { return { episodeServers: ['VidStreaming'], supportsDub: false }; } async search(opts) { const searchUrl = `https://www.hentaicity.com/search?keyword=${encodeURIComponent(opts.query)}`; const res = await fetch(searchUrl); const html = await res.text(); const $ = LoadDoc(html); const results = []; $('.video-item').each((_, el) => { const title = $(el).find('.title').text(); const id = $(el).find('a').attr('href'); results.push({ id: id, title: title, url: `https://www.hentaicity.com${id}`, subOrDub: 'sub' }); }); return results; } async findEpisodes(id) { return [{ id: id, number: 1, title: 'Full Video', url: `https://www.hentaicity.com${id}` }]; } async findEpisodeServer(episode) { const res = await fetch(`https://www.hentaicity.com${episode.id}`); const html = await res.text(); const videoUrlMatch = html.match(/file: "(.*?)"/); const videoUrl = videoUrlMatch ? videoUrlMatch[1] : ''; return { server: 'VidStreaming', videoSources: [{ url: videoUrl, type: 'm3u8', quality: '720p' }] }; } }
